info.name: Generate a specific HTTP status code

params.name: statusCode
params.description: The HTTP status code to generate.

params.name: sleep
params.description: Delay the response by the specified duration in milliseconds (max 230 seconds for hosted instance).

items.docs:
Generates a response with the given HTTP status code.  
For JSON responses, include the `Accept: application/json` header.

info.name: Generate a random HTTP status code

params.name: range
params.description: The range of HTTP status codes to randomize (e.g., `200,201,500-504`).

items.docs:
Generates a random HTTP status code from the specified range.  
Duplicate ranges can increase their probability.
